reason: This sample demonstrates excellent quality across all three layers. The assistant correctly uses tree, glob, and grep tools to explore the codebase, stays grounded in actual tool outputs, and provides clear explanations of code patterns (try/catch, React components, hooks) that match the user's screenwriter persona. The user-agent behaves naturally with realistic follow-up questions about error handling and UI components, avoiding technical jargon. The planner's three goals (directory structure, code patterns, component examples) are coherent and fully achieved in sequence. The only minor note is that the assistant reconstructs code snippets from grep matches rather than showing exact file contents, but this is reasonable for demonstration purposes and maintains accuracy.
